title: Disobeying A Warrant Officer Or Petty Officer Ucmj
source_filename: Disobeying A Warrant Officer Or Petty Officer Ucmj.docx

qas.q: Conduct that creates a work environment that a reasonable person would consider intimidating or hostile is best defined by what term?
What person at your command has mandatory membership on the Command Assessment Team (CAT)?
Provides safety planning services, comprehensive assistance, and liaison to and for victims of domestic abuse is the responsibility of what entity?
Service members married to each other or in a personal relationship should NOT be assigned to what same area?
Personal relationships are allowed between a Navy officer and an enlisted service member with which of the following affiliations?
qas.a: Marine Corps, Coast Guard, and Foreign Military

qas.q: What Department of the Navy IT designation is NOT privileged to sensitive information?
The Security Education Program onboard a ship is the overall responsibility of what officer?
Service members are protected against self-incrimination under what article of the Uniform Code of Military Justice (UCMJ)?
You should find information on assaulting or willfully disobeying a superior commissioned officer in what Uniform Code of Military Justice (UCMJ) Article?
A Commanding Officer who is a Lieutenant Commander or higher can award what maximum amount of restriction time?
You should find procedures for non-judicial punishment under what Uniform Code of Military Justice article?
Disobeying a Warrant Officer or Petty Officer is covered under what Uniform Code of Military Justice (UCMJ) article
Random urinalysis testing is required to be conducted at what minimum time interval?
Providing managers and supervisors with alcohol and drug abuse prevention knowledge and skills is the purpose of which of the following courses?
Servicemember's Group Life Insurance (SGLI) beneficiaries should be verified at which of the following times?
All participants in Fitness Enhancement Program (FEP) must wear what type of garments?
Command fitness leaders should be what minimum paygrade?
Measures undertaken that are intended to lessen the potentially adverse effects on a given military operation is the definition of what term?
The 9mm pistol magazine has a capacity of what maximum number of rounds?
According to Navy's Occupational Safety and Health (NAVOSH) regulations, you should immediately report work place hazards to what individual?
What form is used to record safety observations in the workplace?
The Navy Sexual Assault Prevention and Response program instruction is NOT applicable to Sailors or dependents under which of the following circumstances?
qas.a: Military dependents under the age of 18 who were sexually assaulted

qas.q: Sexual harassment training is required to be conducted at what specific interval?
To include a hands-off approach between medical providers and leadership, reintegration of a Sailor who has received psychological support should be handled in what way?
On social media, what are signs of suicidal ideations?
qas.a: Joking about dying, expressing hopelessness and feeling trapped, and patterns or changes in the type of content posted

qas.q: Upon receiving a sixth Navy and Marine Corps Achievement Medal, what device(s) should be attached to the ribbon?
On the working jacket, what is the prescribed location for wearing your command's organizational patch?
The rating badge on your service dress coat should be worn in which of the following positions?
qas.a: Vertically centered between the shoulder seam and elbow

qas.q: The chevrons on male rating badges, E-4 through E-6, should be what specific width, in inches?
While wearing your uniform cover at a crowded gathering, when, if ever, should you salute an officer?
A white guard belt prescribed as part of a uniform that includes a peacoat or a raincoat should be worn in what location(s)?
qas.a: Outside both the raincoat and peacoat

qas.q: Service members are required to take all of the following actions, EXCEPT which one?
qas.a: Discourage juniors from using the formal resolution system

qas.q: A command climate assessment should be conducted at what minimum frequency?
qas.a: Within 90 days after assumption of command

qas.q: Relationships between officers and enlisted personnel that do not respect differences between rank and grade are defined by what term?
Of the following relationships, which one should be considered fraternization?
qas.a: An E-6 instructor dating an E-6 student

qas.q: The recipient of a Letter of Intent has what maximum number of days submit a written response?
Aboard ship, confinement on bread and water may be given to what paygrade(s)?
The Code of Conduct for members of the U.S. Armed Forces was prescribed by what President of the United States?
Under the Geneva Convention, for which of the following actions are prisoners responsible?
During an Executive Officer's Investigation, he is NOT authorized to perform what action?
The NAVPERS 1626/7 form is known by which of the following named forms?
What is the minimum monthly urinalysis testing requirements for assigned command personnel?
Prior to assignment as the command Drug and Alcohol Program Advisor, a Sailor must have achieved sobriety for what minimum number of years, after he was classified as alcohol dependent?
When preparing a budget, fixed expenses should include which of the following items?
Appropriate weight loss levels are what maximum number of pounds for a) males and b) females per week?
Body composition percentages for men are determined by measuring which of the following body features?
When an increased or more predictable threat of terrorist activity exists, what type of Force Protection Condition (FPCON) is applicable?
The 9mm pistol is equipped with what total number of safety features?
Temporary special instructions for hazardous equipment should be identified by what item?
When conducting a job safety analysis, which of the following steps should you complete first?
qas.a: Select the specific job to be analyzed

qas.q: Commanding officers are required to review documentation associated with a new Sailor's Enlisted Official Military Personnel File (OMPF) field code 91 entries within what maximum number of days of assignment?
A new Sailor reporting to your command should receive sexual harassment training within what maximum number of days after arrival?
If you believe someone to be suicidal, what actions should you take?
On the dress white jumper, the bottom side of the trouser pocket opening should be below the hem of the jumper what total number of inches?
What organization within the Navy is responsible for maintaining the uniform regulations?
The "uniform of the day" is authorized for wear during which of the following events?
Items authorized for wear within certain uniforms, but not required during a sea bag inventory, are referred to by what term?
What uniform characteristic is used to identify a Fleet/Force Command Master Chief?
qas.a: The rating insignia has a silver star in place of the specialty rank

qas.q: Job assignment based on gender or race rather tahn capacbilities describes what diversity barrier?
To enforce equal opportunity, a command is authorized to take all of the following actions, EXCEPT which one?
When interviewing a Sailor for the purposes of diagnosis or treatment, which of the following entities is NOT required to read the Uniform Code of Military Justice Article 31 (b) memoranda to him?
Fraternization is based on what concept?
Which of the following material should be classified SECRET?
Leading Petty Officer authority and responsibility falls into what two categories?
Which of the following documents is NOT a source for basic disciplinary law?
When a Sailor knowingly makes a false official statement, he can be charged with what Uniform Code of Military Justice article?
What is an example of a command delivered prevention education program?
All newly reported personnel should submit for urinalysis testing within what maximum number of hours of reporting on board?
For help balancing your checkbook, you should see which of the following individuals?
qas.a: Leading Petty Officer, command financial specialist, or family service center program specialist

qas.q: Preventative measures taken to mitigate hostile actions against Department of Defense personnel, resources, facilities, and critical information defines what term?
When working on unguarded scaffolding, a lifeline and safety harness is required to be worn at what minimum height?
What individual(s) is/are ultimately responsible for the safety of a Navy unit?
When providing advice to sexual assault victims, which of the following statements are Sexual Assault Response Coordinators (SARCs) NOT required to discuss?
qas.a: Command policy that would limit restricted reporting

qas.q: Sexual assault of victims under 18 years of age should be reported through what agency or authority?
The Navy Suicide Prevention handbook is designed to serve what purpose?
qas.a: To serve as a reference for policy guidance and educational tools

qas.q: What is the most common method of suicide in the military?
When wearing a full dress uniform with large medals, you should wear your ribbons in what location and order?
qas.a: Above the right breast pocket with the senior ribbon inboard

qas.q: According to Navy grooming standards for men, hair should be tapered from the lower hairline upward to at least what distance?
What instruction governs the wearing of civilian clothing for Navy personnel?
Which of the following programs ensures that commands do not wait for discriminatory incidents to occur before taking action?
Navy unit reporting for fraternization incidents must be reported using what method?
The overall classification of a publication should be placed on the title page in what location?
The disclosure of significant scientific developments is what security classification?
You should find information on the failure to an obey order or regulation in what Uniform Code of Military Justice article?
You should find information on the failure to obey an order or regulation in what Uniform Code of Military Justice article?
When a performance deficiency is corrected, which of the following privileges can NOT be withheld?
You are working on a project with a contractor and are offered a coupon for a free dinner. What action should you take?
What Uniform Code of Military Justice article covers desertion?
The term "responsible use" of alcoholic beverages refers to self-imposed limitations of which of the following factors?
qas.a: Times, quantities to consume, and place

qas.q: Servicemember's Group Life Insurance (SGLI) is authorized at a) what maximum amount in thousands of dollars, and can be disbursed in b) what maximum number of monthly allotments?
Once a Sailor is enrolled in the Fitness Enhancement Program (FEP), what action should he take to exit it?
qas.a: Pass mock or official Physical Readiness Test (PRT) and BCA standards

qas.q: Fitness Enhancement Program (FEP) documentation includes all of the following information, EXCEPT which one?
As it pertains to Operational Risk Management, hazard severity is best defined by which of the following phrases?
qas.a: Potential degree of injury, illness, property damage, loss of assets, or effect on mission

qas.q: The Navy's Occupational Safety and Health (NAVOSH) program information is contained in what publication?
To determine whether behavior meets the legal test for sexual harassment, what objective measure should be applied?
Acts of sexual assault involving active duty service members should be reported using what means of communication?
Which is a monthly newsletter for Suicide Prevention Coordinators and key personnel?
You want to place embroidering on the back of your blue ball cap. Which of the following markings is NOT authorized?

As a LPO, when a subordinate makes an informal report of discrimination to you, you must inform the command climate specialist or command managed equal opportunity program manager within what specified time period?
Restricted reporting for domestic abuse victims can be suspended for which of the following reasons?
qas.a: When judgement is made by law enforcement officials that disclosure is necessary to prevent an imminent threat against the victim

qas.q: The underlying theme of fraternization policy is reflected in which of the following terms?
Which of the following relationships is NOT considered fraternization?
qas.a: A male petty officer first class and a female petty officer second class

qas.q: The outside of the door or front of the control drawer of a General Services Administration (GSA) approved security container and vault doors must have what item affixed?
Material is labeled as "Classified" for which of the following reasons?
An accused cannot demand trial by court-martial after which of the following events has occurred?
Of the following statements, which, if any, defines the primary purpose of the Code of Conduct?
qas.a: To provide a standard of conduct when captured

qas.q: Information pertaining to missing ship's movement is detailed in what Uniform Code of Military Justice article?
"I am required to give name, rank, service number, and date of birth" is covered under what Code of Conduct article?
Financial institutions normally provide statements at what specific time frequency?
Fitness Enhancement Program (FEP) documents must be retained by the command for what minimum number of years?
The Physical Readiness Program is outlined in what instruction?
According to Operational Stress Control, which is not a principle of resilience and stress control?
When required to be returned to the issuing activity upon the individual's transfer, clothing loaned to an individual by a Navy activity is referred to by what term?

While at the Enlisted Club, you observe what appears to be Petty Officer Brush with an earring in his left ear and a tongue stud. You also observe another Sailor showing a new tattoo on his forearm that had previously been covered. What is the maximum authorized size of a tattoo on a Sailor's forearm?
qas.a: No larger than the Sailor's hand with fingers extended and together

qas.q: Personnel in pay grades E-1 through E-3 who have qualified for a particular rate wear what insignia?
What is the authorized maximum fingernail length from end of the finger tip for a) males and b) females?
A senior-subordinate relationship that is prejudicial to good order and discipline is referred to by what term?
Regulations and guidance for safeguarding classified information are contained in what document?
Classification markings on a document should be placed in what locations?
Which of the following statements concerning extending working hours is NOT correct?
qas.a: Extended working hours is a punitive measure to correct a military deficiency in performance

qas.q: Authority for a Senior Chief Petty Officer to assign extra military instruction (EMI) may be authorized by what person?
Servicemember's Group Life Insurance (SGLI) terminates 31 days after all of the following events, EXCEPT which one?
qas.a: Release from active duty for training

qas.q: Command Fitness Leaders and Assistant Command Fitness Leaders should NOT make what type of recommendation for a Sailor?
For all matters dealing with antiterrorism/force protection (AT/FP), what person is directly responsible to the Commanding Officer?
In the Operational Risk Management process, risk decisions should be made at what step?
Coordinating a comprehensive safety program based on the objectives of the Commanding Officer is the responsibility of what authority?
While in uniform, what maximum number of barrettes is a female authorized to wear?

While at the Enlisted Club, you observe what appears to be Petty Officer Brush with an earring in his left ear and a tongue stud. You also observe another Sailor showing a new tattoo on his forearm that had previously been covered. According to Uniform Regulations, when is Petty Officer Brush permitted to wear an earring?
qas.a: Off base in civilian attire only

qas.q: While at the Enlisted Club, you observe what appears to be Petty Officer Brush with an earring in his left ear and a tongue stud. You also observe another Sailor showing a new tattoo on his forearm that had previously been covered. According to Uniform Regulations, when is Petty Officer Brush permitted to wear an earing?
qas.a: Off base in civilian attire only

qas.q: When wearing your uniform, what color eyeglass retaining strap are you authorized to wear?
Which of the following ribbon devices constitute a single-constructed attachment?
qas.a: Two gold stars connected at the time of manufacture

qas.q: Effective quality of life programs increase which of the following items?
Which of the following relationships between the Division Officer and the Leading Petty Officer is an example of fraternization?
qas.a: The Leading Petty Officer has loaned the Division Officer $100

qas.q: Steps that confirm information through multiple sources, reducing the changes of erroneous conclusions and susceptibility to deception describes what process?
Serving as the command self-referral procedure agent is the responsibility of what person?
You should balance your checkbook at what minimum time interval?
The acronym SOFA represents which of the following terms?
Ensuring personnel are properly outfitted with protective clothing and equipment prior to starting a task is the responsibility of what person?

A NAVPERS 1070/887 form issued to a Sailor who was awarded Non-Judicial Punishment for a sexual offense will be retained in that Sialor's Official Military Personnel File (OMPF) for what maximum period?
You are allowed to wear one Navy service stripe on the left sleeve of a jumper after completion of what requirement?
qas.a: 4 full years of active or Reserve service in any of the armed forces, or any combination thereof

qas.q: You should NOT wear medals on which of the following uniforms?
What device is authorized for wear on the command ball cap?
The security clearance list that allows personnel to work on your ship should be authorized by what officer(s)?
When creating information that is potentially classified without classification authority, you should mark the material in what manner?
All of the following statements regarding extra military instruction (EMI) are correct, EXCEPT which one?
qas.a: May be conducted on the individual's Sabbath

qas.q: What is the first intervention step in the treatment of alcohol abuse?
To obtain assistance when counseling a Sailor regarding financial problems, you should access which of the following resources?
Which of the following causes of premature death and illness is considered the most preventable?
Regarding Operational Risk Management, the vulnerability of an asset or are is determined by assessing all of the following factors, EXCEPT which one?
Personnel should initially report work place hazards to what individual?
A Sexual Assault Disposition Report (NAVPERS 1752/1) must be maintained by NCIS for what minimum number of years?
To promote five action steps for talking to someone who may be suicidal, what social media campaign is partnered with the National Suicide Prevention Lifelines?
qas.a: The Every Sailor, Every Day Campaign

qas.q: A security classification is marked on a document using all of the following methods, EXCEPT which one?
A Sailor may elect coverage for his spouse under the Family Serviceman's Group Life Insurance (FSGLI) for what maximum amount?
The risk assessment code (RAC) combines what elements?
When in uniform, under what situation is a cell phone permitted to be worn on a belt?
qas.a: One device can be worn on a belt of working and service uniforms aft of the elbow

qas.q: Which of the following individuals is NOT legally obligated to report allegations of domestic abuse?
The security termination statement is located on which of the following forms?
The command Drug and Alcohol Program Adviser reports directly to what individual?
Information on making allotments and rules governing their use should be obtained from what individual?
Promoting an environment free from personal, social, or institutional barriers that prevent members from rising to the highest level of responsibility is the basis for which program?
The Geneva Convention states that a prisoner must answer which of the following questions?
qas.a: What is your date of birth

qas.q: Any violation, attempted violation, or solicitation of another to violate the Navy's hazing policy is punishable by what authority?
qas.a: The Uniform Code of Military Justice

qas.q: What Thrift Savings Plan invest solely in bonds?
When a terrorist attack has occurred in the immediate area or when intelligence indicates an impending attack against a specific location, what Force Protection Condition (FPCON) should be set?
Attempting or offering to do bodily harm to another person is covered under what Uniform Code of Military Justice article?
The maximum effective range of a 9mm pistol is what specific distance?
Which of the following medals has the highest precedence with regard to campaign and service awards?
The chevrons on female rating badges should be what width, in inches?
Which of the following terms is NOT a type of child maltreatment?
Which of the following conditions is a valid reason to receive an authorized Body Composition Assessment waiver?
qas.a: Recent surgery on body area used to measure Body Composition Assessment (BCA)

qas.q: To review information regarding reduction of Government Life Insurance, you should refer to which of the following references?
Which is an example of a protective factor that may reduce suicide?
Operational Risk Management is a method that does NOT include which of the following actions?
